name: Proactive Synthesis Patterns
description: Mechanisms for autonomously extracting and indexing knowledge from system activity, successes, and failures.

error_to_knowledge.description: Extracting anti-patterns and mitigation strategies from system errors and failed execution cycles.

success_to_knowledge.description: Capturing successful implementation patterns and tool-chains from walkthroughs and task completion reports.

save_on_discover.description: Mandatory registration of discovered factory assets into Memory MCP after a failed retrieval attempt.

keyword_gap_analysis.description: Identifies missing Knowledge Items by scanning recent activity for keywords not present in the current manifest.
best_practices: Scan CHANGELOG.md and brain/ walkthroughs regularly.
Index all newly discovered scripts, workflows, and skills immediately.
Include purpose, goal, and keywords in memory observations.
Link KIs to the tasks where they were synthesized.
anti_patterns: Manual memory entry without verifying filesystem existence.
Stale entries that conflict with the actual code in scripts/.
